title: Global Energy Is Not Conserved in an FRW Universe — an AI-reproduced established result (Open Dossier)
description: PRE-RELEASE WORKING DRAFT (no version asserted, not released). A verification-instrumented, AI-assisted reproduction of an established general-relativity result: global energy is not conserved in an FRW universe, shown three independent ways. Every physics claim is labeled established-reproduced; no novel physics and no reliability claim are asserted. An Open Dossier publication.
